mentions.note: First major 2026 IPO; priced $24.50, opened $28.50, closed Friday $32.56 (+33%). Disruptive asset-light equipment rental with proprietary T3 software platform and OWN sale-leaseback model. 140% revenue CAGR 2015–2024; 36% 3-year CAGR justifies 14.5x EV/EBITDA vs. peers' 8–10x. Similar playbook to early Carvana — buy on weakness.
